terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.subtitle: Please read these terms carefully before using our services.
terms.acceptance_text: By accessing and using this website, you accept and agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree, please do not use this service.
terms.orders_text: Orders placed through this platform are subject to availability. Once an order is confirmed, cancellation may not be possible. Please review your order carefully before placing it.
terms.payments_text: All payments are processed securely through certified payment gateways. We do not store any credit card information on our servers.
terms.privacy_text: Your personal information is collected and handled in accordance with our Privacy Policy. By using this service, you consent to the collection and use of your data as described.
terms.contact_text: If you have any questions or concerns about these Terms and Conditions, please contact us through our Contact page.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Your privacy matters to us. Here's how we handle your data.
privacy.collection_text: We collect information you provide when creating an account, placing orders, or contacting us. This includes your name, email address, phone number, and delivery addresses.
privacy.use_text: We use your information to process and deliver your orders, send order confirmations and updates, improve our services, and communicate promotional offers (with your consent).
privacy.sharing_text: We do not sell your personal information to third parties. We share it only as necessary to fulfill orders (e.g., with delivery partners) and to comply with legal requirements.
privacy.rights_text: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data at any time. You can download your data or request account deletion from the Privacy & Data section of your account.
privacy.contact_text: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or wish to exercise your data rights, please contact us through our Contact page.
